entry.name: SMC_CONFIGURATION_OPERATION_INVALID
entry.description: SMC configuration operation was invalid

entry.name: SMC_CONFIGURATION_OPERATION_SUCCESS
entry.description: SMC configuration operation was successful

entry.name: SMC_CONFIGURATION_OPERATION_INVALID_TARGET_ITEM_NUMBER
entry.description: The specified number of target items is either 0 or exceeds the maximum number (255)

entry.name: SMC_CONFIGURATION_OPERATION_CONFIGURATION_HAS_ALREADY_BEEN_COMMITTED
entry.description: The specified configuration exists and has already been committed

entry.name: SMC_CONFIGURATION_OPERATION_NO_CONFIGURATION_CREATED
entry.description: No configuration has been created

entry.name: SMC_CONFIGURATION_OPERATION_CONFIGURATION_DOES_NOT_EXIST
entry.description: The specified configuration does not exist

entry.name: SMC_CONFIGURATION_OPERATION_CONFIGURATION_ITEM_ALREADY_EXISTS
entry.description: The configuration item already exists and cannot be overwritten

entry.name: SMC_CONFIGURATION_OPERATION_TOO_MANY_CONFIGURATION_ITEMS
entry.description: The configuration has reached its target configuration item number so no more items may be added

entry.name: SMC_CONFIGURATION_OPERATION_INVALID_STATION_ADDRESS
entry.description: Station address is either 0 or exceeds the maximum value (0x7F)

entry.name: SMC_CONFIGURATION_OPERATION_INVALID_RELEASE_CONSENT
entry.description: Release consent exceeds the maximum value (0xF)

entry.name: SMC_CONFIGURATION_OPERATION_TOO_FEW_KIZ_COORDINATES
entry.description: Number of provided KIZ coordinates is below the count provided in the configuration item

entry.name: SMC_CONFIGURATION_OPERATION_TOO_MANY_KIZ_COORDINATES
entry.description: Number of provided KIZ coordinates exceeds the count provided in the configuration item

entry.name: SMC_CONFIGURATION_OPERATION_INVALID_KIZ_COORDINATES
entry.description: Kiz coordinates are invalid

entry.name: SMC_CONFIGURATION_OPERATION_INVALID_TIMESTAMPS
entry.description: Timestamps provided either incorrectly overlap or exist in the past

entry.name: SMC_CONFIGURATION_OPERATION_INVALID_MAXIMUM_DURATION
entry.description: Maximum execution duration of the configuration item cannot be 0

entry.name: SMC_CONFIGURATION_OPERATION_CONFIGURATION_NOT_READY
entry.description: The configuration cannot be committed as some configuration items have not been added

entry.name: SMC_CONFIGURATION_OPERATION_SIGNATURE_FAILURE
entry.description: The cryptographic signature representing the configuration could not be correctly resolved based on the signing key

entry.name: SMC_CONFIGURATION_OPERATION_CERTIFICATE_CHAIN_FAILURE
entry.description: The cryptographic signature representing the configuration could not be correctly resolved based on the certificate chain

enum.name: SMC_REQUEST_PARAMETERS_OPERATION_RESULT
enum.description: Result from SMC request parameter operations

entry.name: SMC_REQUEST_PARAMETERS_OPERATION_INVALID
entry.description: Request parameter operation was invalid

entry.name: SMC_REQUEST_PARAMETERS_OPERATION_SUCCESS
entry.description: Request parameter operation was successful

entry.name: SMC_REQUEST_PARAMETERS_OPERATION_NO_COMMITTED_CONFIGURATION
entry.description: No configuration has been committed so parameters cannot be validated

entry.name: SMC_REQUEST_PARAMETERS_OPERATION_INVALID_STATION_ADDRESS
entry.description: Station address is either 0 or exceeds the maximum value (0x7F)

entry.name: SMC_REQUEST_PARAMETERS_OPERATION_INVALID_RELEASE_CONSENT
entry.description: Release consent exceeds the maximum value (0xF)

entry.name: SMC_REQUEST_PARAMETERS_OPERATION_INVALID_REQUEST_DURATION
entry.description: Request execution duration is 0

entry.name: SMC_REQUEST_PARAMETERS_OPERATION_NO_CORRESPONDING_CONFIGURATION_ITEM
entry.description: No corresponding configuration item exists for these requested parameters

entry.name: SMC_REQUEST_PARAMETERS_OPERATION_REQUEST_DURATION_EXCEEDS_MAXIMUM_ALLOWED
entry.description: Request execution duration exceeds that allowed by the corresponding configuration item

entry.name: SMC_AUTHORISATION_FAILURE
entry.description: The SMC authorisation operation failed

entry.name: SMC_AUTHORISATION_SUCCESS
entry.description: The SMC authorisation operation was successful

entry.name: SMC_AUTHORISATION_PARTIAL_OK
entry.description: The ongoing SMC authorisation operation is currently ok

message.name: SMC_STATUS
message.field: Timestamp of when the event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch).
SMC state
SMC substate
Station address send to the SMC interlock through an explicit command. Only the lowest 7 bits are valid.
Release consent send to the SMC interlock through an explicit command. Only the lowest 4 bits are valid.
Indicates whether the SMC board is supplied with 24 volts (boolean value)
UUID corresponding to the currently committed configuration
Station address defined by the requested parameters. Only the lowest 7 bits are valid.
Release consent defined by the requested parameters. Only the lowest 4 bits are valid.
Maximum duration that these requested parameters are applicable for
8-bit ID number corresponding to the configuration item being executed
Maximum execution duration of the configuration item being executed

message.name: SMC_NEW_CONFIGURATION
message.description: Requests the creation of a new SMC configuration that will store various items required for authorising payload engagement
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
UUID of this configuration that will be used to reference it in later messages
Number of items intended to be stored in this configuration

message.name: SMC_NEW_CONFIGURATION_RESPONSE
message.description: Response to a previous SMC new configuration request message
message.field: The request_id field of the message that triggered this response
Result of the SMC new configuration operation

message.name: SMC_APPEND_CONFIGURATION_ITEM
message.description: Appends a new SMC configuration item that will detail the station address, release consent and conditions required for its activation
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
UUID of the configuration that this item will be added to
Sequence number for this configuration item
Station address that this configuration item will apply to
Release consent that this configuration item will apply to
Number of latitude/longitude points that define the KIZ in counter clock-wise order
Series of latitudes that are the first value in up to 8 KIZ pairs as defined by the point count
Series of longitudes that are the second value in up to 8 KIZ pairs as defined by the point count
Timestamp (in milliseconds since epoch) of when this configuration item can be executed
Timestamp (in milliseconds since epoch) of when this configuration item can no longer be executed
Duration (in milliseconds since epoch) of the maximum time that this item can remain executed

message.name: SMC_APPEND_CONFIGURATION_ITEM_RESPONSE
message.description: Response to a previous SMC append configuration item message
message.field: The request_id field of the message that triggered this response
Result of the SMC append configuration item operation

message.name: SMC_APPEND_SIGNATURE
message.description: Appends a cryptographic signature based on the serialised version of a specific configuration
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
UUID of the configuration this signature corresponds to
Total size in bytes of this signature
Byte offset relative to the total signature size. Used to track transfer progress of the signature.
Bytes comprising the signature starting from a certain offset. It has a max limit of 251 bytes with any remaining sent through subsequent messages.

message.name: SMC_APPEND_SIGNATURE_RESPONSE
message.description: Response to a previous SMC append signature message
message.field: The request_id field of the message that triggered this response
Result of the attempted SMC append signature operation

message.name: SMC_APPEND_CERTIFICATE_CHAIN
message.description: Appends a certificate chain based on one or more signing keys
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
UUID of the configuration this certificate chain corresponds to
Total size in bytes of this certificate chain
Byte offset relative to the total certificate chain size. Used to track transfer progress of the certificate chain.
Bytes comprising the certificate chain starting from a certain offset. It has a max limit of 251 bytes with any remaining sent through subsequent messages.

message.name: SMC_APPEND_CERTIFICATE_CHAIN_RESPONSE
message.description: Response to a previous SMC append certificate chain message
message.field: The request_id field of the message that triggered this response
Result of the attempted SMC append certificate chain operation

message.name: SMC_COMMIT_CONFIGURATION
message.description: Commits a specific configuration so that its corresponding items may be executed provided the correct conditions
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
UUID of the configuration that will be committed

message.name: SMC_COMMIT_CONFIGURATION_RESPONSE
message.description: Response to a previous SMC commit configuration message
message.field: The request_id field of the message that triggered this response
Result of the attempted SMC commit configuration operation

message.name: SMC_SET_REQUEST_PARAMETERS
message.description: Requests parameters corresponding to a configuration item with the intent on executing that item
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
Station address corresponding to a specific configuration item
Release consent corresponding to a specific configuration item (can be 0 depending on desired function requirements)
Duration (in milliseconds since epoch) that these parameters can remain active

message.name: SMC_SET_REQUEST_PARAMETERS_RESPONSE
message.description: Response to a previous SMC set request parameters message
message.field: The request_id field of the message that triggered this response
Result of the attempted SMC set request parameters operation

message.name: SMC_CLEAR_REQUEST_PARAMETERS
message.description: Clear parameters that were requested previously
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)

message.name: SMC_CLEAR_REQUEST_PARAMETERS_RESPONSE
message.description: Response to a previous SMC clear request parameters message.
message.field: The request_id field of the message that triggered this response
Result of the attempted SMC clear request parameters operation

message.name: SMC_REQUEST_STATE_TRANSITION
message.description: Request a state transition as defined by a state and substate
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)

message.name: SMC_REQUEST_STATE_TRANSITION_ACK
message.field: The request_id field of the request that this ACK is in response to
Result of event

message.name: SMC_LOG_LEVEL_OVERRIDE
message.description: Override log level for the module for a given time period
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
Module ID where we want to control the log level (NULL terminated)
Log level we want to switch to
Duration of the override in seconds

message.name: SMC_LOG_LEVEL_OVERRIDE_ACK
message.field: The request_id field of the request that this ACK is in response to
Result of event
